toro

toro is a package that provides Maplibre GL JS integration for R.

See these vignettes for learning how to use the package:

  • Getting started with toro

  • Integrating with Shiny

  • Adding controls to your map

Examples can be found in the examples directory.

If you would like to contribute to {toro} see: Contributing to {toro}
